description: Source code for Express.js route handlers managing build/workflow APIs, including creation, retrieval, status polling, and cancellation, with error handling and database connectivity considerations.

methods.name: getBuildCreateRequestSchema
methods.description: Asynchronously constructs and returns a Zod schema for build creation requests, with caching.

methods.name: validationError
methods.description: Sends a 400 response with validation error details.

methods.name: isConnectivityError
methods.description: Checks if an error is related to network or database connectivity issues.
